title: String parameters used in arithmetic
author: contributor
diff:
--- a/pricing.py
+++ b/pricing.py
@@ -6,6 +6,12 @@ TAX_RATE = 0.08
 
 def calculate_price(base_price, discount):
+    final = base_price - discount
+    return final * (1 + TAX_RATE)

gold_issues.description: No type validation: if base_price or discount are strings, subtraction raises TypeError at runtime.
